indicators.name: no cooking appliances

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no water fixture, and no hard prep surfaces. The presence of a rowing machine and a window view of the ocean suggests a focus on fitness and relaxation rather than cooking.
